title: strychnos memecyloides
intro: Strychnos memecyloides, also known as the poison nut tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties that can help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Strychnos memecyloides include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic to treat urinary tract infections. Herbal preparations of Strychnos memecyloides typically involve the extraction of its bark, leaves, or roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
